title: Financial Statements
description: Annual Income Statement, Balance Sheet, and Cash Flow for a single ticker, rebuilt from SEC XBRL facts via the equity_statement_matrix view (migration 0006). The three rows act as tabs — click a row title to open or close a statement. Line items are clustered into the sections a filed statement uses (UPPERCASE rows are section headers). Columns are fiscal years (labeled by the calendar year the fiscal year ends in); blank cells mean the filer didn't tag that line. Money values are converted into the selected display currency at each fiscal-year-end FX rate; share-count rows are never converted.

list.name: ticker
list.label: Ticker
list.query: SELECT i.symbol FROM instruments i WHERE i.kind = 'equity' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM fundamentals f WHERE f.instrument_id = i.id) ORDER BY i.symbol
list.definition: SELECT i.symbol FROM instruments i WHERE i.kind = 'equity' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM fundamentals f WHERE f.instrument_id = i.id) ORDER BY i.symbol

list.name: fiscal_year
list.label: Fiscal years
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT fiscal_year::text FROM equity_statement_annual a JOIN instruments i ON i.id = a.instrument_id WHERE i.symbol = '$ticker' ORDER BY 1 DESC
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT fiscal_year::text FROM equity_statement_annual a JOIN instruments i ON i.id = a.instrument_id WHERE i.symbol = '$ticker' ORDER BY 1 DESC

list.name: display_currency
list.label: Currency
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT split_part(unit, '/', 1) AS currency FROM fundamentals WHERE unit ~ '^[A-Z]{3}(/shares)?$' UNION SELECT currency FROM instruments ORDER BY 1
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT split_part(unit, '/', 1) AS currency FROM fundamentals WHERE unit ~ '^[A-Z]{3}(/shares)?$' UNION SELECT currency FROM instruments ORDER BY 1

panels.title: $ticker — Income Statement (annual, $display_currency)
panels.description: One column per fiscal year, from the annual (10-K / 20-F) figures, clustered into revenue & gross profit, operating expenses, non-operating, taxes & net income, and per-share sections. Per-share and share-count rows are per share / share counts; everything else is a total in the display currency. A blank cell means the company didn't report that line under a tag we track.

targets.rawSql: SELECT m.line, m.fiscal_year::text AS fy, m.value * (CASE WHEN m.currency IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(ff.usd_rate / NULLIF(ft.usd_rate, 0), 1) END) AS value FROM equity_statement_matrix m JOIN instruments i ON i.id = m.instrument_id LEFT JOIN fx_usd_daily ff ON ff.currency = m.currency AND ff.date = m.period_end LEFT JOIN fx_usd_daily ft ON ft.currency = '$display_currency' AND ft.date = m.period_end WHERE i.symbol = '$ticker' AND m.statement = 'income' AND m.fiscal_year::text IN ($fiscal_year) ORDER BY m.ord, m.fiscal_year

panels.title: $ticker — Balance Sheet (fiscal year end, $display_currency)
panels.description: Point-in-time balances at each fiscal year end, from the annual filing, clustered into current / non-current assets, current / non-current liabilities, and equity sections. A blank cell means the company didn't report that line under a tag we track.

targets.rawSql: SELECT m.line, m.fiscal_year::text AS fy, m.value * (CASE WHEN m.currency IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(ff.usd_rate / NULLIF(ft.usd_rate, 0), 1) END) AS value FROM equity_statement_matrix m JOIN instruments i ON i.id = m.instrument_id LEFT JOIN fx_usd_daily ff ON ff.currency = m.currency AND ff.date = m.period_end LEFT JOIN fx_usd_daily ft ON ft.currency = '$display_currency' AND ft.date = m.period_end WHERE i.symbol = '$ticker' AND m.statement = 'balance' AND m.fiscal_year::text IN ($fiscal_year) ORDER BY m.ord, m.fiscal_year

panels.title: $ticker — Cash Flow Statement (annual, $display_currency)
panels.description: Annual cash flows from the 10-K / 20-F, clustered into operating, investing, financing, and net-change sections. Capex, acquisitions, dividends, and buybacks are reported as positive outflows (as filed); a blank cell means the company didn't report that line under a tag we track.

targets.rawSql: SELECT m.line, m.fiscal_year::text AS fy, m.value * (CASE WHEN m.currency IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(ff.usd_rate / NULLIF(ft.usd_rate, 0), 1) END) AS value FROM equity_statement_matrix m JOIN instruments i ON i.id = m.instrument_id LEFT JOIN fx_usd_daily ff ON ff.currency = m.currency AND ff.date = m.period_end LEFT JOIN fx_usd_daily ft ON ft.currency = '$display_currency' AND ft.date = m.period_end WHERE i.symbol = '$ticker' AND m.statement = 'cashflow' AND m.fiscal_year::text IN ($fiscal_year) ORDER BY m.ord, m.fiscal_year
